prompt: Generate a branding for a children’s snack using the bright, fun type in Image 1 and the packaging template from Image 2 with the color palate in Image 3.
prompt_refined: Generate a new image displaying a branded children's snack packaging. Utilize the blank packaging template from Image 2. For the branding elements, adopt a bright, fun, and bold font style similar to the 'Pringles' text in Image 1. Apply the complete color palette from Image 3 to all graphic and textual components of the branding design.
objects: Bright, fun, and bold font style for the branded text (similar to Image 1's Pringles text)
Graphic components of the branding design on the packaging
Complete color palette from Image 3 used for all branding elements (text and graphics)
